content.json:
## 🛡️ Hybrid Attack — Cloud & Identity Kill-Chain
Behavior-led hunting for a hybrid identity attack, end-to-end across **7 MITRE ATT&CK phases**: Initial Access → Lateral Movement → Persistence → Discovery → Defense Evasion → Credential Access → Exfiltration. Each tile correlates Entra ID, Azure, on-prem AD, and Defender XDR signals.

**Layout** · One collapsible section per phase; most detections pair a *summary* with a *detail* drill-down. Each phase header lists its **MITRE** techniques and **Key tables**. A `✅ … in this window.` banner means nothing matched — a good sign.

**How to use** · Set **Workspace** + **Time Range**, then scope with the **Attack Phases** selector and optional **User / Device / IP** filters. Check **Data Source Coverage** (below) first to confirm the required tables have recent data.

> These are *hunting* queries (hypothesis-led), not tuned alerts — treat hits as leads to investigate.

## 📡 Data Source Coverage
Freshness of the Sentinel & Defender XDR tables this kill-chain workbook depends on (last 24h). The grid lists each required table with its last-seen time; the honeycomb heatmaps availability at a glance (🟩 Ingesting / 🟥 No data). Confirm coverage here before triaging the phases below.

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
  (AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs", Required="Initial Access · Discovery"),
  (AADUserRiskEvents | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="AADUserRiskEvents", Required="Initial Access"),
  (AzureDiagnostics | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="AzureDiagnostics", Required="Initial Access · Persistence"),
  (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="CommonSecurityLog", Required="Initial Access"),
  (SigninLogs | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="SigninLogs", Required="Initial Access · Persistence"),
  (ThreatIntelIndicators | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="ThreatIntelIndicators", Required="Initial Access · Exfiltration"),
  (AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs", Required="Persistence · Defense Evasion · Credential Access"),
  (AuditLogs | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="AuditLogs", Required="Persistence · Exfiltration"),
  (AzureActivity | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="AzureActivity", Required="Defense Evasion · Credential Access · Discovery"),
  (BehaviorAnalytics | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="BehaviorAnalytics", Required="Defense Evasion"),
  (CloudAuditEvents | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="CloudAuditEvents", Required="Defense Evasion · Credential Access"),
  (CloudProcessEvents | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="CloudProcessEvents", Required="Defense Evasion"),
  (DeviceInfo | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="DeviceInfo", Required="Defense Evasion · Lateral Movement"),
  (DeviceNetworkInfo | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="DeviceNetworkInfo", Required="Defense Evasion"),
  (CloudStorageAggregatedEvents | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="CloudStorageAggregatedEvents", Required="Credential Access"),
  (CloudAppEvents | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="CloudAppEvents", Required="Discovery · Exfiltration"),
  (IdentityInfo | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="IdentityInfo", Required="Lateral Movement"),
  (StorageBlobLogs | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) | extend Table="StorageBlobLogs", Required="Exfiltration")
| project Table, Required, LastSeen = iif(isnotempty(LastSeen),tostring(LastSeen),"No Data") //, Status=iff(isnotempty(LastSeen), "Ingesting", "No data")
| order by LastSeen desc//, Status desc

content.json:
## 🔴 Initial Access
Credential stuffing/spray and risky sign-ins against VPN/network apps, TI-matched appliance traffic, CVE exploitation on edge appliances, web-service RCE with egress, Azure VM IMDS token theft, and first-seen Kubernetes control-plane writes.

**MITRE:** T1110 · T1190 · T1133 · T1078.004 · T1059 · T1552.005  
**Key tables:** SigninLogs · AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs · CommonSecurityLog · ThreatIntelIndicators · _Im_NetworkSession · _Im_ProcessEvent · AzureDiagnostics

content.query:
let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let failureThreshold = 10;
let sprayUserThreshold = 5;
let stuffingWindowMinutes = 60;
let vpnAppKeywords = dynamic([
    "GlobalProtect", "Palo Alto Networks", "Fortinet",
    "Cisco AnyConnect", "Cisco Secure Client", "Zscaler", "Pulse Secure",
    "Ivanti Connect Secure", "Ivanti Secure Access", "Ivanti VPN", "F5", "NetScaler", "Citrix Gateway",
    "Barracuda VPN", "SonicWall"]);
// Failure codes that indicate wrong-password attempts (credential stuffing indicators)
// 50053=AccountLocked, 50126=InvalidPassword, 50056=InvalidPassword(variant),
// 50064=CredentialValidationFailure, 70000=InvalidGrant
let failureCodes = dynamic([50053, 50126, 50056, 50064, 70000]);
let Failures =
    union SigninLogs, AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where ResultType in (failureCodes)
    | where AppDisplayName has_any (vpnAppKeywords)
    | where IPAddress !in ("127.0.0.1", "::1", "0.0.0.0")
    | project FailTime = TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, AppDisplayName;
let Successes =
    union
       (SigninLogs                       | extend LocationDetails = todynamic(LocationDetails)),
       (AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs  | extend LocationDetails = todynamic(LocationDetails))
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where ResultType == 0
    | where AppDisplayName has_any (vpnAppKeywords)
    | project
        SuccessTime           = TimeGenerated,
        UserPrincipalName,
        UserId,
        IPAddress,
        AppDisplayName,
         RiskLevelDuringSignIn = column_ifexists('RiskLevelDuringSignIn', ''),
         RiskLevelAggregated   = column_ifexists('RiskLevelAggregated', ''),
          Country               = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion),
          City                  = tostring(LocationDetails.city);
// Pattern A: Credential Stuffing — many failures on same user from same IP, then success
let PatternA =
    Failures
    | summarize
        FailureCount = count(),
        FirstFailure = min(FailTime),
        LastFailure  = max(FailTime)
      by UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, AppDisplayName
    | where FailureCount >= failureThreshold
    | join kind=inner Successes on UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, AppDisplayName
    | where SuccessTime > LastFailure
    | where datetime_diff('minute', SuccessTime, FirstFailure) <= stuffingWindowMinutes
    | summarize arg_min(SuccessTime, *) by UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, AppDisplayName
    | project
        PatternType           = "A — Credential Stuffing",
        SuccessAfterFailuresTime              = SuccessTime,
        UserPrincipalName,
        EntraProfileUrl = strcat("https://entra.microsoft.com/#view/Microsoft_AAD_UsersAndTenants/UserProfileMenuBlade/~/overview/userId/",UserId),
        XDRIPUrl   = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", IPAddress,"/overview"),
        IPAddress,
        AppDisplayName,
        Country,
        City,
        FailureCount,
        FirstFailure,
        SignalStrength        = iff(FailureCount >= 50, "High", "Medium"),
        RiskLevelDuringSignIn,
        RiskLevelAggregated;
// Pattern B: Password Spray — same IP targets many distinct users, at least one success
let PatternB_Failures =
    Failures
    | summarize
        DistinctUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName),
        FailureCount  = count(),
        FirstFailure  = min(FailTime),
        LastFailure   = max(FailTime),
        UserSample = make_set(UserPrincipalName)
      by IPAddress, AppDisplayName;
let PatternB =
    PatternB_Failures
    | where DistinctUsers >= sprayUserThreshold
    | join kind=inner Successes on IPAddress, AppDisplayName
    | where SuccessTime > LastFailure
    | where datetime_diff('minute', SuccessTime, FirstFailure) <= stuffingWindowMinutes
    | summarize arg_min(SuccessTime, *) by IPAddress, AppDisplayName, UserPrincipalName
    // Success user must be one of the sprayed accounts — avoids FP from unrelated logins on shared IPs
    | where array_index_of(UserSample, UserPrincipalName) != -1
    | project
        PatternType           = "B — Password Spray",
        SuccessAfterFailuresTime              = SuccessTime,
        UserPrincipalName,
        EntraProfileUrl = strcat("https://entra.microsoft.com/#view/Microsoft_AAD_UsersAndTenants/UserProfileMenuBlade/~/overview/userId/",UserId),
        XDRIPUrl   = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", IPAddress,"/overview"),
        IPAddress,
        AppDisplayName,
        Country,
        City,
        FailureCount,
        DistinctUsers,
        FirstFailure,
        SignalStrength        = iff(DistinctUsers >= 20, "High", "Medium"),
        RiskLevelDuringSignIn,
        RiskLevelAggregated;
union PatternA, PatternB
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or UserPrincipalName contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or IPAddress contains '{IPFilter}'
| extend TimeDeltaMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', SuccessAfterFailuresTime, FirstFailure)
| sort by SignalStrength asc, SuccessAfterFailuresTime desc
| project-reorder SignalStrength, PatternType, UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, AppDisplayName, FailureCount, DistinctUsers, TimeDeltaMinutes, FirstFailure, SuccessAfterFailuresTime, RiskLevelDuringSignIn, EntraProfileUrl, XDRIPUrl
| limit 25
content.title: VPN Credential Stuffing & Spray (Pattern A: Stuffing / Pattern B: Spray)

content.query:
let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let correlationWindowMinutes = 60; // risk event must occur within this window of the sign-in
  let vpnAppKeywords = dynamic(["GlobalProtect", "Palo Alto Networks", "Fortinet", "Cisco AnyConnect", "Cisco Secure Client", "Zscaler", "Pulse Secure",
      "Ivanti Connect Secure", "Ivanti Secure Access", "Ivanti VPN", "F5", "NetScaler", "Citrix Gateway", 
      "Barracuda VPN", "SonicWall"]);
let highValueRiskTypes = dynamic([
    "leakedCredentials",
    "investigationsThreatIntelligence",
    "mcasImpossibleTravel",
    "unlikelyTravel",
    "anonymizedIPAddress",
    "maliciousIPAddress",
    "unfamiliarFeatures"]);
// Successful VPN logins
let VPNLogins =
    SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where ResultType == 0
    | where AppDisplayName has_any (vpnAppKeywords)
    | project
        SignInTime        = TimeGenerated,
        UserPrincipalName,
        IPAddress,
        AppDisplayName,
        Country           = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion),
        City              = tostring(LocationDetails.city),
        ConditionalAccessStatus;
// Risk detection events for same period
// RiskState filter: exclude already-remediated/dismissed events to avoid FPs
// from risks Entra ID has already auto-resolved (e.g., user passed MFA challenge)
let RiskEvents =
    AADUserRiskEvents
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where RiskLevel in ("high", "medium")
    | where RiskEventType in (highValueRiskTypes)
    | where RiskState in ("atRisk", "confirmedCompromised")  // exclude remediated/dismissed/confirmedSafe
    | project
        RiskTime          = coalesce(ActivityDateTime, TimeGenerated),
        UserPrincipalName,
        RiskEventType,
        RiskLevel,
        RiskDetail,
        RiskState;
// Join: VPN login correlated with a risk event for same user within riskWindow
VPNLogins
| join kind=inner RiskEvents on UserPrincipalName
| where abs(datetime_diff('minute', SignInTime, RiskTime)) <= correlationWindowMinutes
| summarize arg_min(RiskTime, *) by UserPrincipalName, SignInTime, IPAddress, AppDisplayName
| project
    SignInTime,
    UserPrincipalName,
    IPAddress,
    AppDisplayName,
    Country,
    City,
    RiskEventType,
    RiskLevel,
    RiskDetail,
    RiskState,
    RiskTime,
    ConditionalAccessStatus
| extend AccountName      = tostring(split(UserPrincipalName, "@")[0])
| extend AccountUPNSuffix = tostring(split(UserPrincipalName, "@")[1])
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or UserPrincipalName contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or IPAddress contains '{IPFilter}'
| summarize Count = count(), AffectedUsers = dcount(UserPrincipalName) by RiskEventType, RiskLevel
| sort by Count desc
| render barchart

content.query:
let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let postExploitWindow = 15m;
// Known CVE exploitation URL path signatures — extracted from CISA advisories
// Note: /../ removed (too generic — matches any path traversal detected by firewall)
let CVEUrlPaths = dynamic([
    "/api/v1/totp/user-backup-code/",  // CVE-2023-46805 — Ivanti auth bypass
    "/api/v1/license/keys-status/",    // CVE-2024-21887 — Ivanti RCE (keys-status is plural)
    "/api/v2/cmdb/system/admin/",      // CVE-2022-40684 — Fortinet auth bypass
    "/vpns/page.aspx",                 // CVE-2019-19781 — Citrix ADC directory traversal RCE
    "/remote/fgt_lang?lang="           // CVE-2018-13379 — Fortinet SSL VPN path traversal
]);
let ApplianceVendors = dynamic([
    "Fortinet", "Palo Alto Networks", "Ivanti", "Pulse Secure",
    "SonicWall", "Cisco", "Check Point", "Juniper", "F5", "Citrix"]);
// Method 1: Known CVE exploitation URL paths in request or message
let CVE_URL_Hits =
    CommonSecurityLog
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where DeviceVendor in~ (ApplianceVendors)
    // Exclude F5 ASM — WAF detecting attacks against protected apps, not F5 being exploited
    | where DeviceProduct !has "ASM"
    | where RequestURL has_any (CVEUrlPaths)
        or Message has_any (CVEUrlPaths)
    // Exclude Qualys/Nessus scanner probes
    | where Message !has "Qualys" and Message !has "nessus"
    | extend CVEReference = case(
        RequestURL contains "totp/user-backup-code" or Message contains "totp/user-backup-code", "CVE-2023-46805 (Ivanti auth bypass)",
        RequestURL contains "license/keys-status" or Message contains "license/keys-status", "CVE-2024-21887 (Ivanti RCE)",
        RequestURL contains "/api/v2/cmdb/system/admin" or Message contains "/api/v2/cmdb/system/admin", "CVE-2022-40684 (Fortinet auth bypass)",
        RequestURL contains "vpns/page.aspx" or Message contains "vpns/page.aspx", "CVE-2019-19781 (Citrix ADC directory traversal RCE)",
        RequestURL contains "fgt_lang" or Message contains "fgt_lang", "CVE-2018-13379 (Fortinet SSL VPN path traversal)",
        "Unknown CVE path")
    | project
        EventTime       = TimeGenerated,
        DetectionMethod = "Method1 — CVE URL path",
        CVEReference,
        SourceIP,
        DestinationIP,
        SourceUserName,
        DeviceVendor,
        DeviceProduct,
        DeviceAction,
        Activity,
        RequestURL,
        Message,
        Computer,
        SignalStrength  = "High — known CVE exploit path matched";
// Method 2: CVE ID string in appliance log message (vendor IPS catch-all)
let CVE_String_Hits =
    CommonSecurityLog
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where DeviceVendor in~ (ApplianceVendors)
    | where Message contains "CVE-20"
    // Exclude noise sources (RDA-validated):
    | where Message !has "nessus.org"       // Nessus scanner DNS callbacks embedding CVE in hostname
        and Message !has "430002"           // Cisco FTD connection logs (traffic allowed, not threat)
        and DeviceProduct != "Cortex XDR"  // Endpoint detections, not appliance exploit indicators
        and DeviceProduct !has "ASM"       // F5 WAF detecting attacks against protected apps
    | extend CVEReference = extract(@"(CVE-\d{4}-\d+)", 1, Message)
    | where isnotempty(CVEReference)
    | project
        EventTime       = TimeGenerated,
        DetectionMethod = "Method2 — CVE string in log",
        CVEReference,
        SourceIP,
        DestinationIP,
        SourceUserName,
        DeviceVendor,
        DeviceProduct,
        DeviceAction,
        Activity,
        RequestURL,
        Message,
        Computer,
        SignalStrength  = "Medium — CVE reference in log message"
    | summarize arg_min(EventTime, *) by SourceIP, DestinationIP, CVEReference, Computer;
// Method 3: FortiGate SAML/SSO bypass → local admin account creation (FG-IR-26-060)
// Translated from Elastic "FortiGate SSO Login Followed by Administrator Account Creation"
// RDA-validated: FSSO-logon is the correct DeviceAction for FortiGate SSO events
let Forti_SSO_Logins =
    CommonSecurityLog
 | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where DeviceVendor =~ "Fortinet"
 | where DeviceAction == "FSSO-logon"
    | project SSOTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, SourceIP;
let Forti_AdminCreate =
    CommonSecurityLog
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where DeviceVendor =~ "Fortinet"
  | where DeviceEventClassID == "0100044547"
  | where Message has "system.admin" and Message has "Add"
    | project AdminCreateTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, AdminMessage = Message;
let Forti_Sequence =
    Forti_SSO_Logins
    | join kind=inner Forti_AdminCreate on Computer
   | where AdminCreateTime > SSOTime
        and AdminCreateTime < SSOTime + postExploitWindow
    | project
        EventTime       = SSOTime,
          DetectionMethod = "Method3 — FortiCloud SSO auth bypass + admin create (FG-IR-26-060)",
          CVEReference    = "CVE-2026-24858 (FortiCloud SSO authentication bypass)",
        SourceIP,
        DestinationIP   = "",
        SourceUserName  = "",
        DeviceVendor    = "Fortinet",
        DeviceProduct   = "",
        DeviceAction    = "SSO login → admin create",
        Activity        = strcat("Admin created at ", tostring(AdminCreateTime)),
        RequestURL      = "",
        Message         = AdminMessage,
        Computer,
        SignalStrength  = "High — SSO bypass then admin account created within 15 min"
    | summarize arg_min(EventTime, *) by SourceIP, Computer, CVEReference;
// Combine all methods
union CVE_URL_Hits, CVE_String_Hits, Forti_Sequence
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or SourceIP contains '{IPFilter}'
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or SourceUserName contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{DeviceFilter}') or Computer contains '{DeviceFilter}'
| extend SignalCategory = tostring(split(SignalStrength, " — ")[0])  // extracts "High"/"Medium"
| summarize
     Count          = count(),
     AffectedDevices = dcount(Computer),
     UniqueSourceIPs = dcount(SourceIP)
   by CVEReference, SignalCategory
   | sort by Count desc
 | render barchart
content.title: CVE Exploitation on Network Appliance (by CVE Reference)
content.noDataMessage: ✅ No CVE-exploitation indicators on appliance traffic in this window.

content.query:
let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
// New table (ThreatIntelIndicators) uses STIX 2.1 schema:
//   ObservableKey = STIX property path (e.g. "ipv4-addr:value", "network-traffic:src_ref.value")
//   ObservableValue = the actual IP string
// ThreatIntelligenceIndicator is deprecated — stopped ingesting data July 31 2025
let TIIPs =
    ThreatIntelIndicators
    | where IsActive == true
    | where IsDeleted == false
    | where ValidUntil > now()
    | where Confidence >= 50 or isnull(Confidence) or Confidence == 0
    | where ObservableKey in ("ipv4-addr:value", "network-traffic:src_ref.value", "network-traffic:dst_ref.value")
    | where isnotempty(ObservableValue)
    | summarize
        MaxConfidence = max(Confidence),
        Tags          = take_any(Tags)
      by TI_IP = ObservableValue;
// 3P appliance vendors in scope for hybrid attack scenario
let ApplianceVendors = dynamic([
    "Fortinet", "Palo Alto Networks", "Ivanti", "Pulse Secure",
    "SonicWall", "Cisco", "Check Point", "Juniper", "F5", "Citrix"]);
// Direction 1: Inbound — attacker-controlled IP connecting to/through appliance
// Maps to S1 (portal compromise) and S3 (VPN login from attacker IP)
let InboundTIHits =
    CommonSecurityLog
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where DeviceVendor in~ (ApplianceVendors)
    | where isnotempty(SourceIP)
    | where SourceIP !in ("127.0.0.1", "::1", "0.0.0.0")
    | join kind=inner TIIPs on $left.SourceIP == $right.TI_IP
    | project
        EventTime           = TimeGenerated,
        Direction           = "Inbound — attacker to appliance",
        TI_IP               = SourceIP,
        CounterpartIP       = DestinationIP,
        DeviceVendor,
        DeviceProduct,
        Activity,
        DeviceAction,
        SourceUserName,
        DestinationUserName,
        SourcePort,
        DestinationPort,
        ApplicationProtocol,
        Message,
        Computer,
        MaxConfidence,
        Tags,
        ActionTaken = iff(DeviceAction =~ "Block", "Blocked ✓", "⚠️ Allowed");
// Direction 2: Outbound — appliance beaconing to TI-matched C2 destination
// Maps to S5 (implant deployed, maintains C2 channel)
let OutboundTIHits =
    CommonSecurityLog
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where DeviceVendor in~ (ApplianceVendors)
    | where isnotempty(DestinationIP)
    | where DestinationIP !in ("127.0.0.1", "::1", "0.0.0.0")
    | join kind=inner TIIPs on $left.DestinationIP == $right.TI_IP
    | project
        EventTime           = TimeGenerated,
        Direction           = "Outbound — appliance to C2",
        TI_IP               = DestinationIP,
        CounterpartIP       = SourceIP,
        DeviceVendor,
        DeviceProduct,
        Activity,
        DeviceAction,
        SourceUserName,
        DestinationUserName,
        SourcePort,
        DestinationPort,
        ApplicationProtocol,
        Message,
        Computer,
        MaxConfidence,
        Tags,
        ActionTaken = iff(DeviceAction =~ "Block", "Blocked ✓", "⚠️ Allowed");
// Combine both directions
union InboundTIHits, OutboundTIHits
| extend SignalStrength = case(
     Direction startswith "Outbound" and ActionTaken == "⚠️ Allowed" and MaxConfidence >= 75,
         "High — active C2 callback, NOT blocked",

content.query:
let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
// Parent processes commonly associated with web-facing services.
let WebServiceParents = dynamic([
  "w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "apache2", "tomcat9.exe",
  "java.exe", "java", "node.exe", "dotnet.exe", "php-cgi.exe", "php.exe"
]);
// Child processes and utilities frequently seen in post-exploitation chains.
let RareChildProcesses = dynamic([
  "cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "pwsh.exe", "sh", "bash", "curl", "wget",
  "certutil.exe", "bitsadmin.exe", "mshta.exe", "rundll32.exe", "python.exe", "python3"
]);
// Command-line indicators that suggest staging, download, or shell launch behavior.
let EgressIndicators = dynamic(["http://", "https://", "-enc", "/c ", "/bin/sh", "wget ", "curl "]);
// Find suspicious child process executions launched by web-service parents.
let RareChildren =
  _Im_ProcessEvent(starttime=StartTime,endtime=EndTime)
  | where EventType =~ "ProcessCreated"
  | extend ParentProcess = tolower(coalesce(ActingProcessFilename, ActingProcessFileOriginalName)),
           ChildProcess = tolower(coalesce(TargetProcessFilename, TargetProcessFileOriginalName)),
           ChildCommandLine = coalesce(TargetProcessCommandLine, "")
  | where ParentProcess in~ (WebServiceParents)
  | where ChildProcess in~ (RareChildProcesses)
    or ChildCommandLine has_any (EgressIndicators)
  | project ProcessTime = TimeGenerated,
            DeviceId = tostring(coalesce(DvcId, DvcHostname)),
            DeviceName = coalesce(DvcHostname, DvcFQDN),
            InitiatingProcessFileName = ParentProcess,
            InitiatingProcessCommandLine = tostring(ActingProcessCommandLine),
            FileName = ChildProcess,
            ProcessCommandLine = ChildCommandLine;
// Capture successful outbound connections to public (non-private) IP space.
let OutboundConnections =
  _Im_NetworkSession(starttime=StartTime,endtime=EndTime)
  | where isnotempty(DstIpAddr)
  | where not(
     ipv4_is_in_range(DstIpAddr, "10.0.0.0/8")
     or ipv4_is_in_range(DstIpAddr, "172.16.0.0/12")
     or ipv4_is_in_range(DstIpAddr, "192.168.0.0/16")
     or ipv4_is_in_range(DstIpAddr, "127.0.0.0/8")
     or ipv4_is_in_range(DstIpAddr, "169.254.0.0/16")
    )
  | where EventResult !~ "Failure"
  | project DeviceId = tostring(coalesce(DvcId, DvcHostname)),
            RemoteIP = DstIpAddr,
            RemotePort = DstPortNumber,
            NetworkTime = TimeGenerated;
// Correlate suspicious child execution with near-term public egress on the same host.
RareChildren
| join kind=innerunique OutboundConnections on DeviceId
| where NetworkTime between (ProcessTime .. (ProcessTime + 5m))
| extend TimeGenerated = ProcessTime
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          FileName, ProcessCommandLine, RemoteIP, RemotePort
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or RemoteIP contains '{IPFilter}'
| where isempty('{DeviceFilter}') or DeviceName contains '{DeviceFilter}'
| summarize
     Count          = count(),
     UniqueChildren = dcount(FileName),
     UniqueRemoteIPs = dcount(RemoteIP)
   by DeviceName
| top 10 by Count desc
| render barchart

## 🟡 Persistence
MFA methods registered on risky accounts, secrets added to dormant service principals, federation/identity-provider changes, app-credential changes preceding SP sign-in bursts, and Kubernetes daemonset/cronjob deployment by non-automation identities.

**MITRE:** T1098.005 · T1098.001 · T1556.007 · T1136.003 · T1053.003  
**Key tables:** AuditLogs · SigninLogs · AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs · _Im_Authentication · _Im_AuditEvent · AzureDiagnostics

content.query:
let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
  let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
    let riskLevels = dynamic(["medium", "high"]);
  let MFAEvents = AuditLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where OperationName in (
    "User registered security info",
    "Admin registered security info",
    "User updated security info",
    "Admin updated security info",
    "User changed default security info",
    "User deleted security info",
    "Admin deleted security info")
  | where Result =~ "success"
  | extend TargetUserUPN = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName)
  | extend TargetUserId  = tostring(TargetResources[0].id)
  | extend ActorUPN      = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
  | extend ActorId       = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.id)
  | extend ActorIP       = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress)
  | where isnotempty(TargetUserId)
  | mv-expand Detail     = AdditionalDetails
  | extend DetailKey     = tostring(Detail.key)
  | extend DetailValue   = tostring(Detail.value)
  | summarize
      MFATime    = min(TimeGenerated),
      ActorUPN   = any(ActorUPN),
      ActorId    = any(ActorId),
      ActorIP    = any(ActorIP),
      AuthMethod = anyif(DetailValue, DetailKey == "AuthenticationMethod")
      by Id, OperationName, TargetUserUPN, TargetUserId;
  let RiskyUsers = SigninLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where RiskLevelAggregated in (riskLevels)
  | summarize LastRiskySignIn = max(TimeGenerated), MaxRiskRank = max(case(RiskLevelAggregated == "high", 3, RiskLevelAggregated == "medium", 2, RiskLevelAggregated == "low", 1, 0)) by UserId
  | extend MaxRiskLevel = case(MaxRiskRank == 3, "high", MaxRiskRank == 2, "medium", MaxRiskRank == 1, "low", "none");
  MFAEvents
  | join kind=inner RiskyUsers on $left.TargetUserId == $right.UserId
  | where LastRiskySignIn <= MFATime
  | extend AdminPerformedChange = iff(ActorUPN != TargetUserUPN and isnotempty(ActorUPN), true, false)
  | where isempty('{UserFilter}') or TargetUserUPN contains '{UserFilter}'
  | summarize
    TotalEvents = count(),
    HighRiskCount = countif(MaxRiskLevel == "high"),
    MediumRiskCount = countif(MaxRiskLevel == "medium"),
    AdminChanges = countif(AdminPerformedChange == true),
    AffectedUsers = dcount(TargetUserUPN)
  | project
    Title = "MFA on Risky Accounts",
    TotalEvents,
    HighRiskCount,
    MediumRiskCount,
    AdminChanges,
    AffectedUsers

content.query:
let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
  let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
  let dormancyWindow = 14d;
  let CredentialAdditions = AuditLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where OperationName == "Add service principal credentials"
  | where Result =~ "success"
  | extend TargetSPId      = tostring(TargetResources[0].id)
  | extend TargetSPName    = tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName)
  | extend ActorUPN        = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
  | extend ActorUserId     = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.id)
  | extend ActorAppName    = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.displayName)
  | extend ActorAppId      = tostring(InitiatedBy.app.appId)
  | extend ActorIPAddress  = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress)
  | extend Actor           = iif(isnotempty(ActorUPN), ActorUPN, ActorAppName)
  | extend ActorType       = case(isnotempty(ActorUPN), "User", isnotempty(ActorAppName), "App", "Unknown")
  | where isnotempty(TargetSPId)
  | project CredentialAddTime = TimeGenerated, TargetSPId, TargetSPName,
            ActorUPN, ActorUserId, ActorAppName, ActorAppId, ActorIPAddress, Actor, ActorType;
  let TargetSPIds = CredentialAdditions | distinct TargetSPId;
  let SPSignIns = AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between ((StartTime - dormancyWindow) .. EndTime)
  | where ResultType == "0"
  | where ServicePrincipalId in (TargetSPIds)
  | project SignInTime = TimeGenerated, ServicePrincipalId, AppId;
  CredentialAdditions
  | join kind=leftouter (SPSignIns) on $left.TargetSPId == $right.ServicePrincipalId
  | summarize
      LastSignInBeforeAdd = maxif(SignInTime, SignInTime < CredentialAddTime),
      FirstSignInAfterAdd = minif(SignInTime, SignInTime >= CredentialAddTime),
      TargetSPName   = take_any(TargetSPName),
      ActorUPN       = take_any(ActorUPN),
      ActorUserId    = take_any(ActorUserId),
      ActorAppName   = take_any(ActorAppName),
      ActorAppId     = take_any(ActorAppId),
      ActorIPAddress = take_any(ActorIPAddress),
      Actor          = take_any(Actor),
      ActorType      = take_any(ActorType),
      SPAppId        = take_anyif(AppId, isnotempty(AppId))
    by TargetSPId, CredentialAddTime
  | where isnull(LastSignInBeforeAdd)
       or LastSignInBeforeAdd < (CredentialAddTime - dormancyWindow) 
  | where isnotnull(FirstSignInAfterAdd)
  | extend DormancyStatus = iif(isnull(LastSignInBeforeAdd),
      strcat("No sign-in in prior ", tostring(toint(dormancyWindow / 1d)), " days"),
      strcat(tostring(datetime_diff('day', CredentialAddTime, LastSignInBeforeAdd)), " days dormant"))
  | extend MinutesToActivation = datetime_diff('minute', FirstSignInAfterAdd, CredentialAddTime)
  | extend AnonymousActor = isempty(Actor)
  | extend EntraSPUrl = strcat("https://entra.microsoft.com/#view/Microsoft_AAD_IAM/ManagedAppMenuBlade/~/Overview/objectId/", TargetSPId, "/appId/", SPAppId)
  | extend XDRIPUrl = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", ActorIPAddress, "/overview")
  | project
      MinutesToActivation,
      AnonymousActor,
      ActorType,
      Actor,
      TargetSPName,
      EntraSPUrl,
      DormancyStatus,
      ActorIPAddress,
      XDRIPUrl,
      CredentialAddTime,
      FirstSignInAfterAdd
  | where isempty('{UserFilter}') or Actor contains '{UserFilter}'
  | where isempty('{IPFilter}') or ActorIPAddress contains '{IPFilter}'
  | order by MinutesToActivation asc, CredentialAddTime desc
  | take 25

  | where Result =~ "success"
  | extend ActorUPN=tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName),

          ActorId=tostring(InitiatedBy.user.id),
          TargetDomain=tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName),

              OperationNames=make_set(OperationName),
              ActorUPN=any(ActorUPN),
              ActorIPAddress=any(ActorIPAddress),
              ActorId=any(ActorId),
              UserAgent=anyif(DetailValue, DetailKey == "User-Agent"),
              EventCount=dcount(Id)
            by TargetDomain, TargetDomainId;
  let FederationActorIds = FederationEvents | where isnotempty(ActorId) | distinct ActorId;
  FederationEvents
  | join kind=leftouter (
      SigninLogs
      | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)

Multi-service network exposure preceding key/data access, novel SPN sign-ins into Azure RBAC writes, Azure network-config tampering by compromised identities, and pod-token tooling preceding cloud RBAC writes.

**MITRE:** T1562 · T1578 · T1550.001 · T1098.003

content.query:
let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let BaselineWindow = 14d;
  let RbacWindow = 60m;
  // Baseline successful SPN sign-in tuples for rarity test
  let SpnBaseline =
    AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
    | where TimeGenerated between ((StartTime - BaselineWindow) .. StartTime)
    | where ResultType =~ 'Success' or ResultType == '0'
    | extend SpId = tolower(tostring(ServicePrincipalId)),
             AppIdNorm = tolower(tostring(AppId)),
             IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
             UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent),
             CredNorm = tolower(tostring(ClientCredentialType))
    | where isnotempty(SpId) and isnotempty(IpNorm)
    | summarize by SpId, AppIdNorm, IpNorm, UaNorm, CredNorm;
  // Current successful SPN sign-ins in hunt interval
  let SpnCurrent =
    AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where ResultType =~ 'Success' or ResultType == '0'
    | extend SpId = tolower(tostring(ServicePrincipalId)),
             AppIdNorm = tolower(tostring(AppId)),
             IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
             UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent),
             CredNorm = tolower(tostring(ClientCredentialType))
    | where isnotempty(SpId) and isnotempty(IpNorm)
    | project SigninTime = TimeGenerated,
              SpId,
              AppIdNorm,
              SpnName = tostring(ServicePrincipalName),
              Identity,
              IpNorm,
              UaNorm,
              CredNorm,
              ResourceDisplayName,
              CorrelationId;
  // Keep only first-seen tuples for high-fidelity hunting.
  let SpnNovel =
    SpnCurrent
    | join kind=leftanti SpnBaseline on SpId, AppIdNorm, IpNorm, UaNorm, CredNorm;
  // Collect RBAC-impacting control-plane write operations
  let RbacWrites =
    AzureActivity
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where ActivityStatusValue =~ 'Succeeded' or ActivitySubstatusValue has 'OK'
    | extend Op = tolower(tostring(OperationNameValue)),
             CallerNorm = tolower(tostring(Caller))
    | where Op has_any (
       'microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/write',
        'microsoft.authorization/roledefinitions/write',
       'microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/delete'
      )
    | project WriteTime = TimeGenerated,
              CallerNorm,
              CallerIpAddress,
              OperationNameValue,
              ResourceId,
              ResourceGroup,
              SubscriptionId,
              CorrelationId,
              Authorization_d;
  // Correlate novel SPN sign-in to RBAC writes via ServicePrincipalId/AppId
  SpnNovel
  | extend JoinKeys = pack_array(SpId, AppIdNorm)
  | mv-expand JoinKey = JoinKeys
  | extend JoinKey = tostring(JoinKey)
  | join kind=inner (
      RbacWrites
      | project WriteTime, CallerNorm, CallerIpAddress, OperationNameValue, ResourceId, ResourceGroup, SubscriptionId, CorrelationId, Authorization_d
    ) on $left.JoinKey == $right.CallerNorm
  // Require near-term temporal chain for stronger suspicion.
  | where WriteTime between (SigninTime .. (SigninTime + RbacWindow))
  | summarize FirstSignin=min(SigninTime),
              FirstRbacWrite=min(WriteTime),
              LastRbacWrite=max(WriteTime),
              RbacWriteCount=count(),
              Operations=make_set(OperationNameValue, 10),
              ResourcesTouched=make_set(ResourceId, 20),
              ResourceGroups=make_set(ResourceGroup, 20),
              Subscriptions=make_set(SubscriptionId, 10),
              FirstSigninIp=any(IpNorm),
              SigninIps=make_set(IpNorm, 5),
              WriteIps=make_set(CallerIpAddress, 5)
    by SpId, AppIdNorm, SpnName, Identity, UaNorm, CredNorm
  | extend TimeGenerated = FirstSignin,
           MinutesToRbac = datetime_diff('minute', FirstRbacWrite, FirstSignin),
           XDRIPUrl = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", FirstSigninIp, "/overview"),
           EntraAppUrl = strcat("https://entra.microsoft.com/#view/Microsoft_AAD_IAM/ManagedAppMenuBlade/~/Overview/objectId/", SpId, "/appId/", AppIdNorm)
  | project TimeGenerated, RbacWriteCount, MinutesToRbac, Operations,
            SpnName, Identity, AppIdNorm, EntraAppUrl, CredNorm, UaNorm,
            FirstSigninIp, XDRIPUrl, SigninIps, WriteIps,
            FirstSignin, FirstRbacWrite, LastRbacWrite,
            ResourcesTouched, ResourceGroups, Subscriptions, SpId
  | where isempty('{UserFilter}') or SpnName contains '{UserFilter}' or Identity contains '{UserFilter}'
  | where isempty('{IPFilter}') or FirstSigninIp contains '{IPFilter}'
  | order by RbacWriteCount desc, FirstRbacWrite desc
  | limit 25

let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
  let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
  let NetworkConfigOps = dynamic([
      "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/write",
      "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/delete",
      "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/securityRules/write",
      "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/securityRules/delete",
      "Microsoft.Network/azureFirewalls/write",
      "Microsoft.Network/azureFirewalls/delete",
      "Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/write",
      "Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/delete",
      "Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/ruleCollectionGroups/write",
      "Microsoft.Network/firewallPolicies/ruleCollectionGroups/delete",
      "Microsoft.Network/frontDoorWebApplicationFirewallPolicies/write",
      "Microsoft.Network/frontDoorWebApplicationFirewallPolicies/delete",
      "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworkGateways/write",
      "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworkGateways/delete",
      "Microsoft.Network/routeTables/write",
      "Microsoft.Network/routeTables/delete",
      "Microsoft.Network/routeTables/routes/write",
      "Microsoft.Network/routeTables/routes/delete",
      "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets/write",
      "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets/delete",
      "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/write",
      "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/delete"
  ]);
  let ApplianceIPs =
      DeviceInfo
      | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
      | where IsInternetFacing == true
      | where DeviceCategory in~ ("Network device", "Unknown")
      | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
      | join kind=inner (
          DeviceNetworkInfo
          | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
          | mv-expand IP = parse_json(IPAddresses)
          | extend ApplianceIP = tostring(IP.IPAddress)
          | where isnotempty(ApplianceIP)
          | where ApplianceIP !in ("127.0.0.1", "::1", "0.0.0.0")
      ) on DeviceId
      | project ApplianceIP, ApplianceName = DeviceName, ApplianceOS = OSPlatform;
  let UEBASignals =
      BehaviorAnalytics
      | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
      | summarize
          UEBAInvestigationPriority = max(InvestigationPriority),
          UEBAFirstTimeOp           = countif(tostring(ActivityInsights.FirstTimeUserUsedApp) == "True"),
          UEBAFirstTimeCountry      = countif(tostring(ActivityInsights.FirstTimeUserConnectedFromCountry) == "True")
        by UserPrincipalName;
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where ActivityStatusValue == "Success"
  | where OperationNameValue in~ (NetworkConfigOps)
  | extend Auth = parse_json(Authorization_d)
  | where not (
      OperationNameValue =~ "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/delete"
      and tostring(Auth.evidence.role) =~ "PIM Contributor"
  )
  | extend CallerType = case(
      tostring(Auth.evidence.principalType) =~ "ServicePrincipal", "ServicePrincipal",
      Caller contains "@",                                          "User",
      tostring(Auth.evidence.principalType) =~ "User",             "User",
      "Unknown")
  | extend CallerUPN = iff(Caller contains "@", Caller, "")
  | extend ResourceCategory = case(
      OperationNameValue contains "networkSecurityGroup",   "NSG",
      OperationNameValue contains "firewallPolicies"
          or OperationNameValue contains "azureFirewall",   "Firewall",
      OperationNameValue contains "WebApplicationFirewall", "WAF",
      OperationNameValue contains "virtualNetworkGateway",  "VPN Gateway",
      OperationNameValue contains "routeTable"
          or OperationNameValue contains "routes/",         "Route Table",
      OperationNameValue contains "subnets",                "Subnet",
      OperationNameValue contains "roleAssignments",        "Role Assignment",
      OperationNameValue)
  | extend ChangeAction = iff(OperationNameValue endswith "/delete", "Delete", "Write")
  | project
      EventTime        = TimeGenerated,
      ResourceCategory,
      ChangeAction,
      OperationName    = OperationNameValue,
      ResourceGroup,
      ResourceId       = _ResourceId,
      Caller,
      CallerType,
      CallerUPN,
      CallerIpAddress,
      SubscriptionId
  | join kind=leftouter UEBASignals on $left.CallerUPN == $right.UserPrincipalName
  | extend UEBAFlagged = isnotempty(UEBAInvestigationPriority) and UEBAInvestigationPriority > 0
  | join kind=leftouter ApplianceIPs on $left.CallerIpAddress == $right.ApplianceIP
  | extend FromApplianceIP = isnotempty(ApplianceName)
  | project-away UserPrincipalName, ApplianceIP
  | extend SignalStrength = case(
      FromApplianceIP,                                               "High",
      CallerType == "ServicePrincipal" and ChangeAction == "Delete", "High",
      CallerType == "ServicePrincipal",                              "Medium",
      UEBAFlagged and ChangeAction == "Delete",                      "Medium",
      UEBAFlagged,                                                   "Medium",
      "Low")
  | extend XDRIPUrl = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", CallerIpAddress, "/overview")
  | where isempty('{UserFilter}') or CallerUPN contains '{UserFilter}'
  | where isempty('{IPFilter}') or CallerIpAddress contains '{IPFilter}'
  | project-reorder SignalStrength, EventTime, ResourceCategory, ChangeAction,
      CallerUPN, CallerType, CallerIpAddress, XDRIPUrl,
      FromApplianceIP, ApplianceName,
      UEBAFlagged, UEBAInvestigationPriority,
      OperationName, ResourceGroup, ResourceId,
      SubscriptionId
      | limit 25

// Time and tuning parameters.
let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let ProcToK8sWindow = 20m;
  let K8sToCloudWindow = 45m;
  // Stage A: process-level signs of token access or cloud token exchange tooling in pods.
  let PodTokenTooling =
    CloudProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where isnotempty(KubernetesNamespace) and isnotempty(KubernetesPodName)
    | extend NamespaceNorm = tolower(tostring(KubernetesNamespace)),
             PodNorm = tolower(tostring(KubernetesPodName)),
             Cmd = tolower(tostring(ProcessCommandLine)),
             Proc = tolower(tostring(ProcessName)),
             ParentProc = tolower(tostring(ParentProcessName))
    | where Cmd has_any (
       '/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token',
       'azure_federated_token_file',
       'oauth2/v2.0/token',
       'login.microsoft.com',
       'sts.windows.net',
       'az login',
       'get-azaccesstoken'
     )
      or (Proc has_any ('az', 'curl', 'wget', 'kubectl', 'pwsh', 'python')
          and Cmd has_any ('token', 'federated', 'oauth2', 'login.microsoftonline', 'sts.windows.net', 'serviceaccount'))
    | project ProcTime=Timestamp, NamespaceNorm, PodNorm, KubernetesResource, ContainerName, ContainerImageName,
              ProcessName, ParentProcessName, ProcessCommandLine, AzureResourceId, ContainerId;
  // Stage B: Kubernetes audit events that can expose token-abuse precursor context, including source IP.
  let K8sAuditBridge =
    CloudAuditEvents
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where DataSource has 'Kubernetes'
    | extend AF = todynamic(AdditionalFields)
    | extend NamespaceNorm = tolower(coalesce(tostring(AF.KubernetesNamespace), tostring(extractjson('$.objectRef.namespace', tostring(RawEventData))))),
             PodNorm = tolower(coalesce(tostring(AF.KubernetesPodName), tostring(extractjson('$.objectRef.name', tostring(RawEventData))))),
             OpNorm = tolower(tostring(OperationName)),
             IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
             UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent)
   | where isnotempty(NamespaceNorm) and isnotempty(PodNorm) and isnotempty(IpNorm)
    | where OpNorm has_any (
       'pods/exec',
       'pods/attach',
       'serviceaccounts/token',
       'tokenreviews',
       'secrets/get',
       'serviceaccounts/get'
     )
    | project K8sAuditTime=TimeGenerated, NamespaceNorm, PodNorm, IpNorm, UaNorm, K8sOperation=OperationName, K8sResourceId=CloudResourceId;
  // Stage C: Azure RBAC write operations from CloudAuditEvents.
  let CloudRbacWrites =
    CloudAuditEvents
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
   | where DataSource has 'Azure'
    | extend OpNorm = tolower(tostring(OperationName)),
             IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
             UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent)
    | where isnotempty(IpNorm)
    | where OpNorm contains 'microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/'
       or OpNorm contains 'microsoft.authorization/roledefinitions/'
    | project CloudTime=TimeGenerated, IpNorm, UaNorm, CloudOperation=OperationName, CloudResourceId, ActionType, CountryCode, IsAnonymousProxy;
  // Correlate A->B by namespace/pod and near-time.
  PodTokenTooling
  | join kind=inner K8sAuditBridge on NamespaceNorm, PodNorm
  | where K8sAuditTime between (ProcTime .. (ProcTime + ProcToK8sWindow))
  // Correlate B->C by source IP and near-time to represent k8s-to-cloud pivot.
  | join kind=inner CloudRbacWrites on IpNorm
  | where CloudTime between (K8sAuditTime .. (K8sAuditTime + K8sToCloudWindow))
  | summarize FirstProcess=min(ProcTime),
              FirstK8sAudit=min(K8sAuditTime),
              FirstCloudWrite=min(CloudTime),
              LastCloudWrite=max(CloudTime),
              CloudWriteCount=count(),
              K8sOps=make_set(K8sOperation, 10),
              CloudOps=make_set(CloudOperation, 10),
              CloudResources=make_set(CloudResourceId, 20),
              Countries=make_set(CountryCode, 5),
              AnyAnonymousProxy=max(toint(IsAnonymousProxy))
    by NamespaceNorm, PodNorm, IpNorm, ContainerName, ContainerImageName, ProcessName, ParentProcessName, ProcessCommandLine
  | extend TimeGenerated = FirstProcess,
           XDRIPUrl = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", IpNorm, "/overview")
  | project TimeGenerated, CloudWriteCount, AnyAnonymousProxy, K8sOps, CloudOps,
            NamespaceNorm, PodNorm, IpNorm, XDRIPUrl, Countries,
            ContainerName, ContainerImageName, ProcessName, ParentProcessName, ProcessCommandLine,
            FirstProcess, FirstK8sAudit, FirstCloudWrite, LastCloudWrite, CloudResources
  | where isempty('{UserFilter}') or PodNorm contains '{UserFilter}' or NamespaceNorm contains '{UserFilter}'
  | where isempty('{IPFilter}') or IpNorm contains '{IPFilter}'
  | order by CloudWriteCount desc, FirstCloudWrite desc
  | limit 25

## 🟤 Credential Access
Key Vault secret reads/harvests preceding partial storage exfil, SPN sign-ins with out-of-scope resource access, novel SPN sign-ins from non-first-party IPs, and Kubernetes token audits preceding novel cloud control-plane operations.

**MITRE:** T1552.001 · T1528 · T1550.001 · T1606  
**Key tables:** AzureActivity · AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs · AzureDiagnostics

content.query:
// Execution window and thresholds.
let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let PivotWindow = 4h;
let SuccessActivity = dynamic(["succeeded", "success"]);
let KeyAuthTypes = dynamic(["accountkey", "sas"]);
let MinStorageOps = 25;
let MinFailures = 3;
let MinReads = 8;
// Stage A: successful Key Vault secret retrieval from management plane telemetry.
let KeyVaultSecretReads =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where isnotempty(Caller) and isnotempty(CallerIpAddress)
  | extend CallerNorm=tolower(Caller), CallerIp=tostring(CallerIpAddress),
           Op=tolower(OperationNameValue),
           Status=tolower(tostring(ActivityStatusValue)),
           SubStatus=tolower(tostring(ActivitySubstatusValue))
  | where Op has "microsoft.keyvault/vaults/secrets/"
  | where Op in~ ("microsoft.keyvault/vaults/secrets/get", "microsoft.keyvault/vaults/secrets/read")
  | where Status in (SuccessActivity) or SubStatus has "ok"
  // Collapse duplicate activity stages into one logical secret-read action.
  | extend ActionKey = iff(
      isnotempty(CorrelationId),
      strcat(CorrelationId, "|", CallerNorm, "|", Op, "|", tostring(ResourceId)),
      strcat(CallerNorm, "|", CallerIp, "|", tostring(SubscriptionId), "|", Op, "|", tostring(ResourceId), "|", tostring(bin(TimeGenerated, 1m)))
    )
  | summarize arg_min(TimeGenerated, *) by ActionKey
  | summarize FirstKvRead=min(TimeGenerated), LastKvRead=max(TimeGenerated),
              KvReadCount=count(), KvOps=make_set(OperationNameValue, 20),
              KvResources=make_set(ResourceId, 30)
    by CallerNorm, CallerIp;
// Stage B: key-auth storage activity with per-actor summary.
let StorageActivity =
  CloudStorageAggregatedEvents
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | extend ActorNorm=tolower(tostring(coalesce(AccountUpn, AccountObjectId, AccountApplicationId))),
           IpNorm=tostring(IpAddress),
           AuthNorm=tolower(tostring(AuthenticationType)),
           StorageNorm=tolower(tostring(StorageAccount))
  | where isnotempty(ActorNorm) and isnotempty(IpNorm) and isnotempty(StorageNorm)
  | where AuthNorm in (KeyAuthTypes)
  | summarize FirstStorage=min(TimeGenerated), LastStorage=max(TimeGenerated),
              StorageEvents=count(), StorageAccounts=dcount(StorageNorm),
              TotalOps=sum(tolong(coalesce(OperationsCount, 0))),
              TotalSuccess=sum(tolong(coalesce(SuccessfulOperationsCount, 0))),
              TotalFailures=sum(tolong(coalesce(FailedOperationsCount, 0))),
              TotalReads=sum(tolong(coalesce(SuccessfulReadOperations, 0))),
              TotalResponseBytes=sum(tolong(coalesce(TotalResponseLength, 0))),
              Services=make_set(ServiceType, 10),
              Accounts=make_set(StorageAccount, 30),
              Containers=make_set(StorageContainer, 30),
              UserAgents=make_set(UserAgentHeader, 10)
    by ActorNorm, IpNorm;
// Stage correlation: secret retrieval followed by mixed-outcome storage behavior.
KeyVaultSecretReads
| join kind=inner StorageActivity on $left.CallerNorm == $right.ActorNorm and $left.CallerIp == $right.IpNorm
| where FirstStorage between (FirstKvRead .. (LastKvRead + PivotWindow))
// Require meaningful activity and explicit mixed outcomes.
| where TotalOps >= MinStorageOps and TotalReads >= MinReads and TotalFailures >= MinFailures
| where TotalSuccess > 0 and TotalFailures > 0
| extend IdentityName = iff(CallerNorm contains "@", tostring(split(CallerNorm, "@")[0]), CallerNorm),
         IdentityUPNSuffix = iff(CallerNorm contains "@", tostring(split(CallerNorm, "@")[1]), ""),
         FailureToSuccessRatio = round(todouble(TotalFailures) / todouble(max_of(TotalSuccess, 1)), 3)
| project TimeGenerated=FirstKvRead,
          Identity=CallerNorm, IdentityName, IdentityUPNSuffix,
          SourceIp=CallerIp,
          FirstKvRead, LastKvRead, KvReadCount, KvOps, KvResources,
          FirstStorage, LastStorage,
          StorageEvents, StorageAccounts,
          TotalOps, TotalSuccess, TotalFailures, FailureToSuccessRatio,
          TotalReads, TotalResponseBytes,
          Services, Accounts, Containers, UserAgents
| extend XDRIPUrl = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", SourceIp, "/overview")
| project-reorder TimeGenerated, FailureToSuccessRatio, TotalReads, TotalFailures, TotalSuccess, TotalOps, Identity, SourceIp, XDRIPUrl, StorageAccounts, StorageEvents
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or Identity contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or SourceIp contains '{IPFilter}'
| order by TotalReads desc, TotalFailures desc
| limit 25

content.query:
// Time and tuning parameters
let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let BaselineWindow = 14d;
let PivotWindow = 6h;
let ScopeWindow = 6h;
let SuccessStatus = dynamic(['succeeded', 'success']);
// Stage A: successful Key Vault secret retrieval
let KvSecretReads =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where isnotempty(Caller) and isnotempty(CallerIpAddress)
  | extend CallerNorm = tolower(tostring(Caller)),
           CallerIp = tostring(CallerIpAddress),
           Op = tolower(tostring(OperationNameValue)),
           Status = tolower(tostring(ActivityStatusValue)),
           SubStatus = tolower(tostring(ActivitySubstatusValue))
  | where Op has 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults/' and Op has '/secrets/'
  | where Op has_any ('/get', '/read')
  | where Status in (SuccessStatus) or SubStatus has 'ok'
  | summarize FirstKvRead=min(TimeGenerated), LastKvRead=max(TimeGenerated), KvReadCount=count() by CallerNorm, CallerIp;
// Stage B: successful SPN sign-ins in timeframe
let SpnSignins =
  AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where ResultType =~ 'Success' or ResultType == '0'
  | extend SpId = tolower(tostring(ServicePrincipalId)),
           AppIdNorm = tolower(tostring(AppId)),
           SigninIp = tostring(IPAddress),
           UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent),
           CredNorm = tostring(ClientCredentialType)
  | where isnotempty(SpId) and isnotempty(SigninIp)
  | project SigninTime = TimeGenerated, SpId, AppIdNorm, SpnName = tostring(ServicePrincipalName), Identity, SigninIp, UaNorm, CredNorm;
// Baseline historical scope touched by each principal in control
let ScopeBaseline =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between ((StartTime - BaselineWindow) .. StartTime)
  | where isnotempty(Caller)
  | extend CallerNorm = tolower(tostring(Caller)),
           ScopeKey = tolower(tostring(coalesce(ResourceGroup, ResourceId, SubscriptionId))),
           Provider = tostring(ResourceProviderValue)
  | where isnotempty(ScopeKey)
  | summarize by CallerNorm, ScopeKey, Provider;
// Current scope touched by caller after suspicious SPN authentication
let ScopeCurrent =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where isnotempty(Caller)
  | extend CallerNorm = tolower(tostring(Caller)),
           ScopeKey = tolower(tostring(coalesce(ResourceGroup, ResourceId, SubscriptionId))),
           Provider = tostring(ResourceProviderValue),
           Op = tostring(OperationNameValue)
  | where isnotempty(ScopeKey)
  | project ActTime = TimeGenerated, CallerNorm, ScopeKey, Provider, Op, ResourceId, ResourceGroup, SubscriptionId, CallerIpAddress;
// Keep only novel scope for each caller.
let ScopeNovel =
  ScopeCurrent
  | join kind=leftanti ScopeBaseline on CallerNorm, ScopeKey, Provider;
// Correlate full chain: KeyVault read -> SPN sign-in -> novel scope
KvSecretReads
| join kind=inner (
    SpnSignins
    | extend JoinKeys = pack_array(SpId, AppIdNorm)
    | mv-expand JoinKey = JoinKeys
    | extend JoinKey = tostring(JoinKey)
    | project SigninTime, SpId, AppIdNorm, SpnName, Identity, SigninIp, UaNorm, CredNorm, JoinKey
  ) on $left.CallerNorm == $right.JoinKey and $left.CallerIp == $right.SigninIp
| where SigninTime between (FirstKvRead .. (LastKvRead + PivotWindow))
| join kind=inner ScopeNovel on $left.CallerNorm == $right.CallerNorm
| where ActTime between (SigninTime .. (SigninTime + ScopeWindow))
| summarize FirstKvRead=min(FirstKvRead),
            FirstSignin=min(SigninTime),
            FirstNovelScope=min(ActTime),
            NovelScopeCount=dcount(ScopeKey),
            Providers=make_set(Provider, 15),
            Operations=make_set(Op, 20),
            Scopes=make_set(ScopeKey, 30),
            ResourceIds=make_set(ResourceId, 20),
            ResourceGroups=make_set(ResourceGroup, 20),
            Subscriptions=make_set(SubscriptionId, 10)
  by CallerNorm, CallerIp, SpId, AppIdNorm, SpnName, Identity, UaNorm, CredNorm
| extend TimeGenerated = FirstKvRead
| where NovelScopeCount >= 2
| project TimeGenerated,
          Identity = CallerNorm,
          SourceIp = CallerIp,
          ServicePrincipalId = SpId,
          AppId = AppIdNorm,
          ServicePrincipalName = SpnName,
          FirstKvRead,
          FirstSignin,
          FirstNovelScope,
          NovelScopeCount,
          Providers,
          Operations,
          Scopes,
          ResourceIds,
          ResourceGroups,
          Subscriptions,
          UserAgent = UaNorm,
          ClientCredentialType = CredNorm
| extend XDRIPUrl = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", SourceIp, "/overview"),
         EntraAppUrl = strcat("https://entra.microsoft.com/#view/Microsoft_AAD_IAM/ManagedAppMenuBlade/~/Overview/objectId/", ServicePrincipalId, "/appId/", AppId)
| project-reorder TimeGenerated, NovelScopeCount, ServicePrincipalName, Identity, SourceIp, XDRIPUrl, AppId, EntraAppUrl, Operations, Scopes, Providers
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or Identity contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or SourceIp contains '{IPFilter}'
| order by NovelScopeCount desc, FirstNovelScope desc
| limit 25

// Hunt window and tuning knobs.
let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let BaselineWindow = 14d;

// Optional allowlist for approved external automation sources.
let ApprovedPublicIps = dynamic([]);
// Stage A: successful Key Vault secret reads.
let KvReads =
  AzureActivity
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | extend Op = tolower(OperationNameValue),
           Status = tolower(tostring(ActivityStatusValue)),
           SubStatus = tolower(tostring(ActivitySubstatusValue)),
           CallerIp = tostring(CallerIpAddress),
           CallerNorm = tolower(tostring(Caller))
  // Keep only successful secret read actions from Key Vault provider paths.
  | where Op has "microsoft.keyvault/vaults/" and Op has "/secrets/" and Op has_any ("/get", "/read")
 | where Status in (dynamic(["success", "succeeded"])) or SubStatus has "ok"
  | where isnotempty(CallerIp)
  | summarize FirstKvRead=min(TimeGenerated), LastKvRead=max(TimeGenerated), KvReadCount=count(),
              KvOps=make_set(OperationNameValue, 15), KvResources=make_set(ResourceId, 25), KvCallers=make_set(CallerNorm, 15)
    by CallerIp;
// Baseline SPN sign-in tuples over prior 14 days.
let SpnBaseline =
  AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between ((StartTime - BaselineWindow) .. StartTime)
  | extend SpnId = tolower(tostring(ServicePrincipalId)),
           AppIdNorm = tolower(tostring(AppId)),
           IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
           UserAgentNorm = tostring(UserAgent),
           CredType = tolower(tostring(ClientCredentialType)),
           ResultNorm = tolower(tostring(ResultType))
  | where isnotempty(SpnId) and isnotempty(IpNorm)
  | where ResultNorm in (dynamic(["0", "success", "succeeded"]))
  | summarize by SpnId, AppIdNorm, IpNorm, UserAgentNorm, CredType;
// Current SPN sign-ins in hunt window.
let SpnCurrent =
  AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | extend SpnId = tolower(tostring(ServicePrincipalId)),
           SpnName = tostring(ServicePrincipalName),
           AppIdNorm = tolower(tostring(AppId)),
           IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
           UserAgentNorm = tostring(UserAgent),
           CredType = tolower(tostring(ClientCredentialType)),
           ResultNorm = tolower(tostring(ResultType)),
           Asn = tostring(AutonomousSystemNumber)
  | where isnotempty(SpnId) and isnotempty(IpNorm)
  | where ResultNorm in (dynamic(["0", "success", "succeeded"]));
// Keep novel tuples only to highlight new SPN behavior.
let SpnNovel =
  SpnCurrent
  | join kind=leftanti SpnBaseline on SpnId, AppIdNorm, IpNorm, UserAgentNorm, CredType
  // Approximate non-1P network by public IP not present in local allowlist.
  | where not(ipv4_is_private(IpNorm))
  | where IpNorm !in (ApprovedPublicIps);
// Sequence correlation: Key Vault read from source IP before novel SPN sign-in.
KvReads
| join kind=inner SpnNovel on $left.CallerIp == $right.IpNorm
| where TimeGenerated between (FirstKvRead .. (LastKvRead + PivotWindow))
| summarize FirstKvRead=min(FirstKvRead), LastKvRead=max(LastKvRead), KvReadCount=max(KvReadCount),
            FirstSpnSignin=min(TimeGenerated), LastSpnSignin=max(TimeGenerated), SpnSigninCount=count(),
            KvOps=any(KvOps), KvResources=any(KvResources), KvCallers=any(KvCallers),
            UserAgents=make_set(UserAgentNorm, 10), CredentialTypes=make_set(CredType, 8),
            ASNs=make_set(Asn, 8), Resources=make_set(ResourceDisplayName, 15)
  by SourceIp=IpNorm, ServicePrincipalId=SpnId, ServicePrincipalName=SpnName, AppId=AppIdNorm
| extend TimeGenerated = FirstSpnSignin
| extend XDRIPUrl = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", SourceIp, "/overview"),
         EntraAppUrl = strcat("https://entra.microsoft.com/#view/Microsoft_AAD_IAM/ManagedAppMenuBlade/~/Overview/objectId/", ServicePrincipalId, "/appId/", AppId)
| project-reorder TimeGenerated, SpnSigninCount, KvReadCount, ServicePrincipalName, SourceIp, XDRIPUrl, AppId, EntraAppUrl, ASNs, UserAgents, CredentialTypes
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or ServicePrincipalName contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or SourceIp contains '{IPFilter}'
| order by FirstSpnSignin desc
| limit 25

content.query:
// Time and tuning parameters.
let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
let BaselineWindow = 14d;
let PivotWindow = 60m;
// Stage A: k8s audit indicators associated with token and workload execution paths.
let K8sTokenAudit =
  CloudAuditEvents
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where DataSource has 'Kubernetes'
  | extend AF = todynamic(AdditionalFields)
  | extend OpNorm = tolower(tostring(OperationName)),
           IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
           UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent),
           NamespaceNorm = tolower(coalesce(tostring(AF.KubernetesNamespace), tostring(extractjson('$.objectRef.namespace', tostring(RawEventData))))),
           PodNorm = tolower(coalesce(tostring(AF.KubernetesPodName), tostring(extractjson('$.objectRef.name', tostring(RawEventData)))))
  | where isnotempty(IpNorm)
  | where OpNorm has_any (
     'serviceaccounts/token',
     'tokenreviews',
     'pods/exec',
     'pods/attach',
     'secrets/get'
   )
  | summarize FirstK8s=min(TimeGenerated), LastK8s=max(TimeGenerated), K8sEventCount=count(), K8sOps=make_set(OperationName, 10)
    by IpNorm, UaNorm, NamespaceNorm, PodNorm;
// Build historical baseline of cloud operation tuples to identify first-seen pivots.
let CloudOpBaseline =
  CloudAuditEvents
  | where TimeGenerated between ((StartTime - BaselineWindow) .. StartTime)
  | where DataSource has 'Azure'
  | extend OpNorm = tolower(tostring(OperationName)),
           IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
           UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent)
  | where isnotempty(IpNorm) and isnotempty(OpNorm)
  | summarize by IpNorm, UaNorm, OpNorm;
// Current sensitive cloud control-plane operations.
let CloudSensitiveCurrent =
  CloudAuditEvents
  | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
  | where DataSource has 'Azure'
  | extend OpNorm = tolower(tostring(OperationName)),
           IpNorm = tostring(IPAddress),
           UaNorm = tostring(UserAgent)
  | where isnotempty(IpNorm) and isnotempty(UaNorm)
  | where OpNorm contains 'microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/'
     or OpNorm contains 'microsoft.authorization/roledefinitions/'
     or OpNorm contains 'microsoft.keyvault/vaults/'
     or OpNorm contains 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts/listkeys/action'
     or OpNorm contains 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions/read'
  | project CloudTime=TimeGenerated, IpNorm, UaNorm, OpNorm, OperationName, CloudResourceId, ActionType, CountryCode, IsAnonymousProxy;
// Keep only novel cloud operation tuples for high-fidelity behavior change.
let CloudSensitiveNovel =
  CloudSensitiveCurrent
  | join kind=leftanti CloudOpBaseline on IpNorm, UaNorm, OpNorm;
// Correlate k8s precursor to novel cloud control-plane behavior.
K8sTokenAudit
| where isnotempty(UaNorm)
| join kind=inner CloudSensitiveNovel on IpNorm, UaNorm
| where CloudTime between (FirstK8s .. (LastK8s + PivotWindow))
| summarize FirstK8s=min(FirstK8s),
            LastK8s=max(LastK8s),
            FirstCloud=min(CloudTime),
            LastCloud=max(CloudTime),
            K8sEventCount=max(K8sEventCount),
            CloudEventCount=count(),
            K8sOps=any(K8sOps),
            CloudOps=make_set(OperationName, 15),
            CloudResources=make_set(CloudResourceId, 20),
            Countries=make_set(CountryCode, 5),
            AnyAnonymousProxy=max(toint(IsAnonymousProxy))
  by IpNorm, UaNorm, NamespaceNorm, PodNorm
| extend TimeGenerated = FirstK8s
| extend XDRIPUrl = strcat("https://security.microsoft.com/ip/", IpNorm, "/overview")
| project-reorder TimeGenerated, CloudEventCount, AnyAnonymousProxy, IpNorm, XDRIPUrl, NamespaceNorm, PodNorm, K8sOps, CloudOps, Countries
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or PodNorm contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or IpNorm contains '{IPFilter}'
| order by CloudEventCount desc, FirstCloud desc
| limit 25

    | where isnotempty(Caller)

content.json:
## 🟠 Lateral Movement
On-prem ↔ cloud identity pivoting: Kerberoast bursts preceding cloud sign-in, AAD Connect/sync-host remote admin into Entra privilege operations, RDP to hybrid-joined devices then Entra access, cloud sign-in to on-prem RDP/remote-exec, and WMI/PsExec on hybrid devices then cloud sign-in.

**MITRE:** T1558.003 · T1021.001 · T1047 · T1569.002 · T1098 · T1078.004  
**Key tables:** IdentityInfo · DeviceInfo · _Im_Authentication · _Im_ProcessEvent · _Im_AuditEvent

content.query:
let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
  let BaselineStart = StartTime - 14d;
  let BaselineEnd = EndTime + 1d;
// Build latest hybrid identity keys for reliable cross-source correlation.
let HybridUsersRaw =
  IdentityInfo
  | where TimeGenerated between (BaselineStart .. BaselineEnd)
  | extend _OnPremDN = column_ifexists("OnPremisesDistinguishedName", column_ifexists("DistinguishedName", ""))
  | where isnotempty(_OnPremDN) and isnotempty(AccountObjectId)
  | project TimeGenerated, AccountObjectId, AccountUPN, AccountDomain, AccountName, BlastRadius
  | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by AccountObjectId
  | extend UPNKey = tolower(AccountUPN),
           SamKey = tolower(strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName)),
           NameKey = tolower(AccountName);
// Normalize multiple account key formats into one joinable user key.
let HybridUsers =
  union isfuzzy=true
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(UPNKey) | project UserKey = UPNKey, HybridUPN = UPNKey, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius, AccountObjectId),
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(SamKey) | project UserKey = SamKey, HybridUPN = UPNKey, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius, AccountObjectId),
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(NameKey) | project UserKey = NameKey, HybridUPN = UPNKey, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius, AccountObjectId);
// Detect potential Kerberoast behavior as a burst of Kerberos service ticket-like auth events.
  let KerberoastBurst =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where EventID == 4769
    // Extract TicketEncryptionType from EventData XML
    | extend TicketEncryptionType = tolower(tostring(extract(@'<Data Name="TicketEncryptionType">([^<]+)</Data>', 1, tostring(column_ifexists("EventData", "")))))
    | where TicketEncryptionType has_any ("0x17", "17")
    | extend Requestor = tolower(tostring(coalesce(Account, TargetUserName))),
             Service = tolower(tostring(ServiceName)),
             ClientIP = tostring(IpAddress)
    | where isnotempty(Requestor) and isnotempty(Service)
    | where Requestor !endswith "$" and Service !endswith "$"
    | summarize FirstKerberoast = min(TimeGenerated),
                LastKerberoast = max(TimeGenerated),
                DistinctServices = dcount(Service),
                KerberoastEvents = count(),
                ServiceSet = make_set(Service, 25),
                SourceIPs = make_set(ClientIP, 10)
      by Requestor
    | where DistinctServices >= 8;
// Collect successful cloud sign-ins for the same identities.
let CloudUserSignins =
  _Im_Authentication(starttime=StartTime, endtime=(EndTime + 1d))
  | where EventResult in~ ("Success", "Partial")
  | where EventProduct =~ "Microsoft Entra ID"
  | where LogonProtocol has_any ("OAuth", "OpenID", "SAML")
      or LogonMethod in~ ("Service Principal", "Managed Identity", "Username & Password", "Multi factor authentication", "Passwordless", "PKI")
  | extend UserKey = tolower(coalesce(ActorUsername, TargetUsername)),
           CloudIP = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
           AppName = tostring(TargetAppName),
           ClientApp = tostring(ActingAppName)
  | where isnotempty(UserKey)
  | project SigninTime = TimeGenerated, UserKey, CloudIP, AppName, ClientApp, CorrelationId = EventOriginalUid;
// Correlate on-prem Kerberoast burst to near-term cloud sign-in activity.
KerberoastBurst
| join kind=innerunique HybridUsers on $left.Requestor == $right.UserKey
| join kind=inner CloudUserSignins on UserKey
| where SigninTime between (LastKerberoast .. (LastKerberoast + 6h))
| summarize FirstCloudSignin = min(SigninTime),
            LastCloudSignin = max(SigninTime),
            CloudSigninCount = count(),
            DistinctCloudIPs = dcount(CloudIP),
            CloudIPs = make_set(CloudIP, 15),
            Apps = make_set(AppName, 10),
            ClientApps = make_set(ClientApp, 10),
            CorrelationIds = make_set(CorrelationId, 10),
            ServiceSet = take_any(ServiceSet),
            SourceIPs = take_any(SourceIPs)
  by FirstKerberoast, LastKerberoast, KerberoastEvents, DistinctServices,
     HybridUPN, HybridSam, BlastRadius,
     AccountObjectId
| extend TimeGenerated = FirstKerberoast
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or HybridUPN contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or tostring(SourceIPs) contains '{IPFilter}'
| summarize Count=count() by BlastRadius
| render barchart
content.title: Kerberoast burst followed by cloud sign-in
content.noDataMessage: ✅ No kerberoast → cloud sign-in chains in this window.

content.query:
let StartTime = {TimeRange:start};
let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};
  let BaselineStart = StartTime - 14d;

let HybridUsersRaw =

  | extend _OnPremDN = column_ifexists("OnPremisesDistinguishedName", column_ifexists("DistinguishedName", ""))
  | where isnotempty(_OnPremDN) and isnotempty(AccountObjectId)
  | project TimeGenerated, AccountObjectId, AccountUPN, AccountDomain, AccountName, BlastRadius

let HybridUsers =
  union isfuzzy=true
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(UPNKey) | project UserKey = UPNKey, HybridUPN = UPNKey, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius, AccountObjectId),
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(SamKey) | project UserKey = SamKey, HybridUPN = UPNKey, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius, AccountObjectId),
    (HybridUsersRaw | where isnotempty(NameKey) | project UserKey = NameKey, HybridUPN = UPNKey, HybridSam = strcat(AccountDomain, "\\", AccountName), BlastRadius, AccountObjectId);
// Detect potential Kerberoast behavior as a burst of Kerberos service ticket-like auth events.
  let KerberoastBurst =
    SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated between (StartTime .. EndTime)
    | where EventID == 4769
    // Extract TicketEncryptionType from EventData XML
    | extend TicketEncryptionType = tolower(tostring(extract(@'<Data Name="TicketEncryptionType">([^<]+)</Data>', 1, tostring(column_ifexists("EventData", "")))))
    | where TicketEncryptionType has_any ("0x17", "17")
    | extend Requestor = tolower(tostring(coalesce(Account, TargetUserName))),
             Service = tolower(tostring(ServiceName)),
             ClientIP = tostring(IpAddress)
    | where isnotempty(Requestor) and isnotempty(Service)
    | where Requestor !endswith "$" and Service !endswith "$"
    | summarize FirstKerberoast = min(TimeGenerated),
                LastKerberoast = max(TimeGenerated),
                DistinctServices = dcount(Service),
                KerberoastEvents = count(),
                ServiceSet = make_set(Service, 25),
                SourceIPs = make_set(ClientIP, 10)
      by Requestor
    | where DistinctServices >= 8;

    | where EventResult in~ ("Success", "Partial")
    | where EventProduct =~ "Microsoft Entra ID"
    | where LogonProtocol has_any ("OAuth", "OpenID", "SAML")
      or LogonMethod in~ ("Service Principal", "Managed Identity", "Username & Password", "Multi factor authentication", "Passwordless", "PKI")
    | extend UserKey = tolower(coalesce(ActorUsername, TargetUsername)),
             CloudIP = tostring(SrcIpAddr),
             AppName = tostring(TargetAppName),
             ClientApp = tostring(ActingAppName)
    | where isnotempty(UserKey)
  | project SigninTime = TimeGenerated, UserKey, CloudIP, AppName, ClientApp, CorrelationId = EventOriginalUid;
// Correlate on-prem Kerberoast burst to near-term cloud sign-in activity.
KerberoastBurst
| join kind=innerunique HybridUsers on $left.Requestor == $right.UserKey
| join kind=inner CloudUserSignins on UserKey
| where SigninTime between (LastKerberoast .. (LastKerberoast + 6h))
| summarize FirstCloudSignin = min(SigninTime),
            LastCloudSignin = max(SigninTime),
            CloudSigninCount = count(),
            DistinctCloudIPs = dcount(CloudIP),
            CloudIPs = make_set(CloudIP, 15),
            Apps = make_set(AppName, 10),
            ClientApps = make_set(ClientApp, 10),
            CorrelationIds = make_set(CorrelationId, 10),
            ServiceSet = take_any(ServiceSet),
            SourceIPs = take_any(SourceIPs)
  by FirstKerberoast, LastKerberoast, KerberoastEvents, DistinctServices,
     HybridUPN, HybridSam, BlastRadius,
     AccountObjectId
| extend TimeGenerated = FirstKerberoast
| where isempty('{UserFilter}') or HybridUPN contains '{UserFilter}'
| where isempty('{IPFilter}') or tostring(SourceIPs) contains '{IPFilter}'
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| limit 25

let EndTime = {TimeRange:end};

let BaselineEnd = EndTime + 1d;
